name: Secret Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions: Measure 3/4 cup of brown and granulated sugars. Beat the margarine until fluffy and white. Add the sugars one at a time and beat until fluffy and white. Stir in vanilla extract. Mix in baking soda and salt. Fold in flour until just combined. Gently stir in chocolate chips and chopped walnuts. Bake for 7 minutes or until barely browned. Cool on wire racks.
